name: glen-apostol-kangen-consultant
description: Premium lead-generation website for Glen Apostol, professional Enagic / Kangen Water consultant.

scripts.deploy:pages: cp index.dev.html index.html && vite build && cp dist/index.html index.html && rm -rf assets && cp -r dist/assets assets && echo 'Built site copied to repo root. Commit & push to main to publish.'
